title: Spigelia spruceana
taxonomy: Spigelia spruceana is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae. It belongs to the genus Spigelia and is a member of the order Gentianales. The classification of Spigelia spruceana is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the phylum Magnoliophyta. This plant is native to tropical and subtropical regions and is characterized by its unique, tubular flowers. The classification is used to identify and distinguish this species from other plants in its family and genus.
